case_title: JULIA RITA SEVERINO VS. LARISA VITENKO et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-26-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-07-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUN-28-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, MARK B. ABELSON TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: OCTOBER 29, 2002 @ 3:00 PM
MAY 28,2002 POS OSC IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BEFORE HEARING BY THE COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM CHARLES GORDON.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEVERINO, JULIA RITA AS TO DEFENDANT VITENKO, LARISA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-28-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-31-2002

PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN DENNIS HOURIHAN.
ARBITRATOR MARK B ABELSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-06-2002 THROUGH DEC-05-2002.
